case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC VS. BARBARA G. WOLRIDGE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC SERVED JUN-05-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, BARBARA G.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, BARBARA G. $659.04 PRINCIPAL, $295.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $954.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15109088)
DECLARATION FOR COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 15109088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15109088) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-19-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $295.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 15109088) AS TO DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, BARBARA G.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WOLRIDGE, BARBARA G. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2014
